title: Developer Intern, Open Source - Fall 2026

tailored_resume.name: Likhitha Chinthirala
tailored_resume.summary: Developer Intern with hands-on experience building web applications and Machine Learning models across remote internships and academic projects. Skilled in Python, Machine Learning, natural language processing, Git, and Oracle SQL. Believe in open source and an AI-driven digital future; built an AI education platform serving real users and an ML phishing detector reaching ~95% accuracy.

experience.title: AI Intern (Virtual)
bullets: Built and evaluated Machine Learning models for sentiment scoring, applying natural language processing to classify ~10K+ text records with strong accuracy.
Engineered artificial intelligence prototypes in Python, iterating through model training and evaluation to deliver better solutions aligned with the team mission.
Performed initial screening and preprocessing of ~10K+ data records, improving model input quality and cutting noise ~30% before training.
Collaborated remotely with mentors and peers, applying clear communication and teamwork to ship code on schedule via Git version control.
Strengthened source posture and secure coding by reviewing public repositories, mitigating risks across project code and following the privacy notice approach to data handling.

experience.title: Developer & ML Projects
bullets: Architected Guidance-Guru, an AI-powered educational platform on React, Node.js, Firebase, and the OpenAI API, with an NLP chatbot and voice-mentor serving real users.
Conducted user research and rapid prototyping across ~15 user sessions to refine UX, shaping current forms and flows toward a clearer digital future for learners.
Built a recruiting-style talent acquisition module with Oracle SQL to store and screen candidate records, automating initial screening and reducing manual review ~40%.
Developed EcoVision-AI, a CNN-based pollution detection model trained on environmental datasets, achieving reliable classification through tuned model training.
Built a Phishing Detection Tool using a Random Forest Machine Learning model, reaching ~95% accuracy to bolster security against malicious URLs and password theft.
Managed all projects on GitHub public repositories, embracing open source and Git workflows while collaborating as part of a remote team.

education.institution: Computer Science and Engineering | Institute of Technology and Science, Khammam | – | CGPA: 8.5/10

projects: Guidance-Guru: AI-powered educational platform built with React, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, Firebase, and OpenAI API featuring NLP chatbot and voice mentor.
EcoVision-AI: CNN-based pollution detection model trained on environmental datasets.
Phishing Detection Tool: Random Forest ML model detecting phishing URLs via feature extraction and dataset preprocessing.
Word Link Game: Browser-based JavaScript puzzle game with scoring logic and difficulty levels.
